overrides.override_summary: Must comply with Fast Food Act (Cal. Lab. Code §§1474-1475) setting health, safety, and employment standards including minimum wages
overrides.why_it_matters: May increase labor costs significantly; no franchisor training or fee assistance provided for compliance

overrides.override_summary: No waiver of claims under state franchise law or disclaimer of reliance on franchisor statements
overrides.why_it_matters: Preserves franchisee's fraud-in-the-inducement claims regardless of acknowledgment forms

overrides.override_summary: Same anti-waiver protection as California
overrides.why_it_matters: Preserves franchisee claims under Hawaii Franchise Investment Law

overrides.override_summary: Release required at renewal/transfer does not apply to claims under MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee retains right to pursue MD law claims even after signing renewal/transfer release

overrides.override_summary: Termination upon insolvency might not be enforceable under federal bankruptcy law
overrides.why_it_matters: Provides additional protection during financial distress

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may bring action in Maryland for MD Franchise Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Overrides Georgia forum requirement for state franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: MD law applies to MD Franchise Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Overrides Georgia governing law for state franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: 3-year statute of limitations for MD Franchise Law claims from grant of franchise
overrides.why_it_matters: Specific deadline for bringing claims

overrides.override_summary: May not terminate prior to expiration except for good cause (30 days to cure)
overrides.why_it_matters: Limits franchisor's termination rights

overrides.override_summary: No restriction on franchisee joining association of franchisees
overrides.why_it_matters: Protects collective action rights

overrides.override_summary: Must fairly compensate franchisee on non-renewal (repurchase at FMV) if term <5 years and franchisee prohibited from competing
overrides.why_it_matters: May provide exit compensation (but JJ term is 10 years, likely not triggered)

overrides.override_summary: May not require arbitration or litigation outside Michigan
overrides.why_it_matters: Overrides Georgia forum for MI franchisees

overrides.override_summary: May not refuse transfer without good cause
overrides.why_it_matters: Limits franchisor's discretion to block transfers

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination with 60 days to cure; 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Significantly extends standard cure periods (vs. 10-30 days in FA) and requires long-lead nonrenewal notice

overrides.override_summary: Consent to transfer will not be unreasonably withheld
overrides.why_it_matters: Statutory protection for transferring franchisees

overrides.override_summary: May not require litigation outside Minnesota
overrides.why_it_matters: Overrides Georgia forum completely for MN franchisees

overrides.override_summary: May not require consent to liquidated damages, termination penalties, or judgment notes; jury trial waiver deleted
overrides.why_it_matters: Eliminates liquidated damages provision (up to 36 months × avg royalty) for MN franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Release at renewal/transfer does not apply to MN Franchise Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Preserves MN law rights

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete generally unenforceable in ND
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee can compete freely after franchise ends despite 2-year/3-mile restriction in FA

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages provision may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: May eliminate 36-month liquidated damages on termination

overrides.override_summary: North Dakota law governs (replaces Georgia law entirely)
overrides.why_it_matters: ND-friendly law applies to all disputes

overrides.override_summary: May bring action in North Dakota to extent required by ND Franchise Investment Law
overrides.why_it_matters: Overrides Georgia forum

overrides.override_summary: Release at renewal/transfer does not apply to ND Franchise Investment Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Preserves ND law rights

overrides.override_summary: Assurance of Discontinuance: removed no-poach provision from FA; will not enforce in existing agreements; no fines assessed
overrides.why_it_matters: Employees can move freely between JJ franchisee locations in WA
